summary: Iteration 150 - SMS Engine and Terminal Credential-Pair Features Testing. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend terminal pair screen tested successfully with both Pairing Code and Login tabs working correctly. SMS Engine has 10 templates, queue management, blast functionality, and stats API all working. Terminal credential-pair allows admin to select branch and manager to auto-link to assigned branch.
critical_code_review_comments: SMS Engine implementation is complete with 10 templates (credit_new, reminder_15day, reminder_7day, overdue_notice, payment_received, charge_applied, delivery_ready, promo_blast, monthly_summary, custom)
SMS queue system correctly handles pending/sent/failed/skipped statuses with proper state transitions
SMS blast feature correctly filters customers and queues messages with deduplication
Terminal credential-pair endpoint correctly handles admin (branch selection) vs manager (auto-link) flows
Existing pairing code flow still works (no regression) - generate-code and poll endpoints functional
Frontend TerminalPairScreen.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for testing
SMS scheduler jobs configured in main.py: daily_sms_reminders at 8AM, monthly_sms_summary on 1st at 9AM
SMS hooks (sms_hooks.py) properly integrated for auto-triggers on credit sale, payment, and charges
test_credentials: Super Admin: janmarkeahig@gmail.com / Aa@58798546521325, Manager PIN: 521325
seed_data_creation: Test SMS messages created during testing (template_key: custom, trigger: manual)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SMS Engine Phase 1-3 complete. Terminal credential login Phase 1 complete. SMS queue stores messages but no actual SMS gateway connected yet (gateway app will poll GET /api/sms/queue/pending). Auto-triggers wired into invoices.py and accounting.py. Scheduled jobs run daily at 8AM (reminders) and monthly 1st at 9AM (summary).

tests_performed.details: All 10 expected template keys present with correct structure
Body and active status can be updated
10 settings returned with trigger_key, template_name, enabled fields
Returns items array and total count
Returns list of pending SMS for gateway polling
Creates SMS with status=pending, template_key=custom, trigger=manual
Returns 400 if phone or message missing
Changes status to failed with error message
Returns pending, sent, failed, skipped, total counts
Returns 400 for missing email or password
Returns status=paired with token and terminal_id
Email, password inputs and Connect Terminal button present

tests_performed.test: Frontend: Admin login shows branch selection

tests_performed.details: Terminal transitions to POS interface after branch selection

mocked_apis.note: SMS queue stores messages but no actual SMS gateway connected yet. Gateway app will poll GET /api/sms/queue/pending and mark sent via PATCH /{id}/mark-sent
